mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pipeline_job_mapping (pipeline_definition_id, job_id, execution_order) VALUES
(#{definitionId}, #{m.jobId}, #{m.executionOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT m.pipeline_definition_id, m.job_id AS jobId, m.execution_order AS executionOrder, j.job_name AS jobName, j.job_type AS jobType, j.preset_id AS presetId, mp.name AS presetName, j.config_json AS configJson FROM pipeline_job_mapping m JOIN pipeline_job j ON j.id = m.job_id LEFT JOIN middleware_preset mp ON mp.id = j.preset_id WHERE m.pipeline_definition_id = #{definitionId} ORDER BY m.execution_order
